text.title: Customer Support Ops Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: ≥20 tickets/month AND ≥2 pricing tiers AND weekly cadence committed?

branch.when: tickets_per_month >= 20 AND pricing_tiers >= 2 AND weekly_cadence_committed == true
